Text: THIS EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT ("Agreement") is entered into between the Company and the Employee. The Employee agrees to perform services for the Company as an employee.
EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT. This Agreement sets forth the terms of employment, compensation, and termination between Employer and Executive.
This Employment Agreement is made effective as of the Effective Date by and between Employer and Employee. Employee will devote full business time to Employer.
THIS LOAN AGREEMENT is made between Lender and Borrower. Borrower promises to repay the principal amount plus interest according to the payment schedule.
LOAN AGREEMENT. The Borrower agrees to pay the Lender interest on the unpaid principal balance and to repay all amounts due at maturity.
This Loan Agreement provides for a revolving credit facility, including interest rate, repayment, and events of default.
STOCK OPTION AGREEMENT. The Company grants the Optionee an option to purchase shares of common stock, subject to vesting and exercise conditions.
This Stock Option Agreement grants options to acquire shares and describes the vesting schedule, exercise price, and expiration.
STOCK OPTION AGREEMENT (Incentive Stock Option). The Optionee may exercise this option to purchase shares pursuant to the Plan.
AGREEMENT AND PLAN OF MERGER. This Merger Agreement is entered into by and among Parent, Merger Sub, and the Company, providing for the merger transaction.
MERGER AGREEMENT. The parties agree to merge the Company with and into Merger Sub, with Parent as the surviving parent entity.
This Agreement and Plan of Merger sets forth the terms and conditions of an acquisition and the closing mechanics.
CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT. The parties agree to keep Confidential Information secret and to use it only for the permitted purpose.
This Confidentiality Agreement (NDA) restricts disclosure of confidential and proprietary information and includes remedies for breach.
CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT. Recipient shall not disclose Discloser’s confidential information and shall return materials upon request.
LEASE AGREEMENT. Landlord leases the Premises to Tenant for the Term, and Tenant agrees to pay rent and comply with the use restrictions.
This Lease Agreement sets forth the rental of the property, including rent, security deposit, maintenance, and default provisions.
LEASE AGREEMENT for office space. Tenant shall pay base rent monthly and maintain insurance as required by Landlord.
LICENSE AGREEMENT. Licensor grants Licensee a non-exclusive license to use the Software, subject to restrictions and fees.
This License Agreement grants rights to use copyrighted materials and defines permitted use, term, and termination.
LICENSE AGREEMENT. The license is limited, revocable, and subject to compliance with the usage terms.
DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT. Supplier appoints Distributor to market and sell Products in the Territory under the terms of this Agreement.
This Distribution Agreement governs appointment of a distributor, pricing, orders, shipping, and termination.
DISTRIBUTION AGREEMENT. Distributor agrees to use commercially reasonable efforts to promote and distribute the Products.
SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. The parties agree to settle and release all claims arising out of the dispute in exchange for the settlement payment.
This Settlement Agreement resolves the litigation and includes mutual releases, confidentiality, and dismissal with prejudice.
SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. In consideration of payment, the parties release and discharge each other from all claims.
Press Release: The Company announced quarterly results today. This document is provided for informational purposes only.
News Article: Markets moved lower on economic data. This is not an agreement and contains no binding obligations.
Website Terms Summary: This page describes the product features and pricing. It is not an executed agreement.
